data.title: IRS Reportedly Gears Up To Lay Off Thousands Of Workers Elon Musk's DOGE Looks To Shrink The Tax Agency
data.description: The U.S. Internal Revenue Service (IRS) is reportedly on the verge of dismissing thousands of employees, a move that could significantly affect the agency's operations during the crucial tax-filing season.

data.title: Do You Know How Long $1 Million Will Last If You Retire At 65? Here's A Hint – Longer Than You're Led To Think!
Mark Zuckerberg Follows Elon Musk's Footsteps As Meta Reportedly Plans Major Investment Into AI-Powered Humanoid Robots
data.description: Mark Zuckerberg could be following Elon Musk's footsteps, as Meta Platforms is reportedly planning a significant investment into AI-powered humanoid robots.

data.title: OpenAI Board Unanimously Rejects Elon Musk's $97 Billion Acquisition Proposal Days After Sam Altman Calls It A Move To 'Slow Down' A Competitor
data.description: OpenAI on Friday turned down a substantial offer from Elon Musk and his consortium of investors to acquire the company's assets.

data.title: Tesla, Ford, GM In Focus: After Tariffs On China, Mexico, And Canada, Trump Now Eyes Auto Industry For Next Move
data.description: President Donald Trump hinted at the possibility of imposing tariffs on automobiles, continuing his aggressive trade policy.
